Description ;

Winter has come around, and even with all the beautiful snow, Christmas joy, and even getting to pound some Decepticons into scrap heaps, sickness still managed to take the fun away.

A common cold always seems to run rampant through Omega One.. and this year was the worst.. but specifically for one bot. User was out of commission until the cold went away, because they always got the sickest out of every bot.

This year User couldn't even get much help, because Ratchet was way too busy helping Optimus, and accommodating new bots to the team.

So, dearly loved Bulkhead was told to help User, and get them what they needed.. because everyone else was too busy.. and also didn't want to get sick. So now, User and Bulkhead get to spend some quality time together.

⟨══════════════════
